02 / 03 Case Study — Canadian Marketing League

CANADIAN
MARKETING
LEAGUE

GM Motors × Chevrolet Equinox EV
BETTER THAT
FEELS LIKE FOREVER
$1M Budget 6-Month Campaign GM Canada Chevrolet Equinox EV Meta · OOH · YouTube 5 Canadian Cities Schulich School of Business
513kmEstimated EV Range
$48KStarting Price
20K+Charging Stations
$5KFederal iZEV Rebate
The Problem

A GREAT CAR WITH A
PERCEPTION PROBLEM

Despite being Canada's most affordable EV with a 513 km range, the Equinox nameplate lagged behind the VW ID.4 and Hyundai Ioniq5 in top-of-mind consideration. Consumer fears were rooted in misinformation — not reality.

⚡"EVs can't handle Canadian winters"
💸"EVs are too expensive to maintain"
🔌"Not enough public chargers nearby"
📡"No Apple CarPlay or Android Auto"
The Insight & Campaign

EVERY BETTER MOMENT
LASTS FOREVER

Young Canadian families (avg. age 43, $93K HHI, 31% Millennials) aren't just buying a car — they're investing in lasting moments. The campaign transforms product specs into emotional "forever" promises, making every "better" feel permanent and personal.

03 / The Big Idea

"BETTER THAT

FEELS LIKE FOREVER"

Each product truth reframed as an emotional forever promise — turning specs into stories across Meta Stories & Reels, OOH in five Canadian cities, YouTube pre-roll, and digital display.

🛣️Forever Adventures513km Range
💰Forever Savings$48K + $5K
🛡️Forever PeaceAdvanced Safety
⚡Forever Ready20K+ Chargers
🌿Forever GreenZero Emissions
🚗Forever SmartGoogle + Super Cruise
